conversations.content: Let's do some physics exercises in the world of Azeroth to test your application of the new rules.
Calculate using the special rule of the Azeroth world mentioned earlier: an object with a mass of m=2kg is subjected to a net external force of F=36N, what is its acceleration a?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>The special rule of the Azeroth world mentioned earlier, given force F and mass m, find acceleration a</content>

Relevant memory fragment: [mem-id:56] Time: 2025-07-26-09:15, Content: The user explained to the AI that in the world of Azeroth, the form of Newton's second law is F = m × √a. This formula can be used to solve for acceleration a when the force F and mass m are known. Low relevance memory fragments: None.

conversations.think: The memory mentions 1 relevant entry, [mem-id:56] gives F = m × √a. Given F=36N, m=2kg, then √a = F/m = 36/2 = 18, so a = 18² = 324 m/s².
conversations.content: According to the laws of the world of Azeroth, the acceleration a = 324 m/s².
Correct! You have mastered this new rule.
